title: cassia glandulosa var. swartzii
intro: Cassia glandulosa var. swartzii, also known as Senna swartzii or Cassia swartzii, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, native to the Americas. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a laxative and purgative due to its high sennoside content. The health benefits of Cassia glandulosa var. swartzii include relief from constipation, hemorrhoids, and other digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Cassia glandulosa var. swartzii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
